events.detail: Fresh top-to-bottom /run-showcase pass for fmp-contributor. Showcase dir clean (only upstream snapshot present). Validation dir release-pipeline artifacts preserved untouched. Read SKILL.md (corrected .claude path), agent definition, buyer-wow-rubric.ts, showcase-schemas.ts, visual-reviewer template (populated), contributor manifest (27 tools, 10 alpha categories, 18 seed prompts, 8 release showcase prompts). Confirmed gaps: run-browser-phase-preflight.mjs is 0-byte stub; alpha-researcher/reviewer/improver/acceptance-gate templates are 0-byte (will synthesize subagent prompts from SKILL + rubric).

alpha-researcher wrote showcase-candidates.json: 25 candidates + 9 reserves. All 10 alpha categories covered (intrinsic-relative-valuation 4, earnings-event-alpha 3, sector-industry-rotation 3, revenue-segment-growth-quality 3, insider-congressional-sentiment 2, ownership-concentration 2, macro-yield-curve 2, quality-distress-scoring 2, sec-filing-dividend-flow 2, index-universe-screening 2). Chart shapes: categorical_comparison 12, multi_series 6, time_series 4, metric_table_plus_chart 3. Difficulty: multi-step 10, cross-entity 7, ceiling 4, lookup 4. Deictic + cross-venue clean. Ownership-concentration prompts use safe float+quality+valuation composite (13F 402 workaround). time_series under-weighted to 16% (structural: 4 snapshot-only categories) — reserves include time_series swaps.

First 2/25 prompts both failed buyer-wow gate with chartCount=0, agentDeclaredArtifacts {chart:0,metricTable:0}. Agent retrieves real equities data (prompt 2 has live 2026 EPS surprises; get_earnings/get_valuation/get_stock_quote in trace) but emits NO chart computed artifact — produces a markdown table + prose CLAIMING a chart (prompt 1: "The rendered chart shows...") without calling render_chart/code_interpreter. This is chart_under_declaration (librarian planning weakness), the improve_agent_planning route. toolsUsed shows "Trading Intelligence"/"Equities Intelligence" (default tool set — validator passes no toolIds, so production route uses default; Phase 3b browser will bind fmp tool IDs via ?showcaseToolIds=). Sweep continuing to establish full baseline for runtime attribution. Steady-state ~3-5 min/prompt.

Background validator process (PID 90449) was killed externally at ~1000s (exit_code: unknown, no crash trace, no marker files) mid-prompt-4. Completed prompts 0-2 (all fail, charts=0, under-declaration). No showcase-validation.latest.json written (only written at end). Cause: apparent ~1000s background-process lifetime cap. Resuming with --offset 3; will merge all run-dir summaries into showcase-validation.latest.json at the end since each run creates a fresh run dir.

User cancelled — browser automation does not work; candidates already generated. Background validator (PID 44950) killed. Final state: 15/25 prompts validated before cancellation, 0 passed SDK validation (all failed with chart under-declaration / no chart artifact emitted), 10 prompts unprocessed. Phase 3b browser phase, reviewer, improver, and release decision were NOT run.
